message.body:
Hi {{name}},

I wanted to let you know that we’ve added new weight loss peptide offerings to our store, including Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, and Retatrutide.

These are available in 10mg lyophilized vials with bacteriostatic water included. As always, we encourage everyone to do their own research.

Please visit our website store for pricing and purchase (keyword "GLP" in the store).

I have put together a little more info at this page:

https://purple-peptides.vercel.app/

Thanks!
Dan
purpleprices.com
